outcome: Substantiated — employee disclosed investment; remediation plan in place
notes: Employee reported colleague's undisclosed financial interest in vendor. Investigation confirmed. Employee signed conflict disclosure and divested.

outcome: Substantiated — password sharing confirmed; retraining completed
notes: Report of shared credentials in engineering team. Investigation confirmed 2 engineers sharing a test environment password. Retraining completed and unique credentials issued.
Harassment complaint. Investigated by HR. Formal warning issued to offending employee. Follow-up monitoring in place.

outcome: Not Substantiated — proper procedures were followed
notes: Report that contractor was downloading customer data to personal device. Investigation found contractor was using approved secure USB for authorized data migration. No violation.

outcome: Substantiated — expense fraud confirmed; employee terminated
notes: Anonymous report of expense report fraud by a sales manager. Internal Audit investigation confirmed $12,400 in fraudulent reimbursements over 8 months. Employee terminated. Funds recovery initiated.
Employee reported that vendor CloudSync had not implemented MFA as contractually required. GRC confirmed during vendor reassessment. CloudSync required to implement by August 2025.
Report of unauthorized remote work from non-approved country. Investigation found employee was working from approved US location. IP geolocation was a VPN artifact.
Employee reports potential retaliation after filing ETH-2025-003. Claims passed over for promotion and excluded from key meetings. GC investigating personally. HR monitoring employment actions.

outcome: Substantiated — process gap identified and remediated
notes: Report that staging environment contained production customer data. CISO investigation confirmed. Data masking procedure updated. Staging environment purged and reloaded with synthetic data.
Complaint about hostile work environment in IT team. Investigation found a communication style mismatch. Mediation conducted. Both parties satisfied with resolution.
